[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001000100 2
1 0001000001 2
2 0010000001 2
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

12 21 0001100000 2

70 07 1000100010 3
